query:
-- Ration plan items for category 7
SELECT rp.effectiveDate, rp.endDate, rp.isActive,
  rpi.qtyPerHeadPerDay, fi.name AS feedItem, fip.pricePerUnit
FROM ration_plans rp
JOIN ration_plan_items rpi ON rpi.planId = rp.id
JOIN feed_items fi ON fi.id = rpi.feedItemId
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT feedItemId, pricePerUnit
  FROM feed_item_prices
  WHERE (feedItemId, effectiveDate) IN (
    SELECT feedItemId, MAX(effectiveDate) FROM feed_item_prices GROUP BY feedItemId
  )
) fip ON fip.feedItemId = rpi.feedItemId
WHERE rp.categoryId = 7 AND rp.isActive = 1;
